title: Lucid, Nuro, and Uber Partner on Autonomous Robotaxi Program
text: Lucid, Nuro, and Uber Partner on Autonomous Robotaxi Program. Production Guidance. Lucid withdrew its full-year production guidance, with a revised full-year outlook expected at the second-quarter earnings call. In Q1 2026, Lucid produced 5,500 vehicles but delivered only 3,093, barely ahead of Q1 2025 output. Robotaxi Partnership Overview. The robotaxi operation is part of a wider collaboration between Lucid, Uber and self-driving firm Nuro. Uber, Lucid, and Nuro will build and deploy 20,000 or more Lucid-Nuro robotaxis in dozens of US and international markets. Expanded Commitment. Lucid and Uber expanded their commitments to a total of at least 35,000 Lucid vehicles, including Lucid Gravity and Lucid Midsize vehicles, designed exclusively for Uber's future global robotaxi service. Launch Timeline. The first Uber-native robotaxis will be available for rides in a major U.S. city exclusively via the Uber app in late 2026. Uber employees have been able to request supervised rides in the San Francisco Bay Area since April, with Lucid confirming 75 engineering vehicles delivered.
